introSection: Shark Escape is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Jenkinson's Boardwalk in Point Pleasant Beach, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders.

fullText:
Shark Escape is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Jenkinson's Boardwalk in Point Pleasant Beach, New Jersey, USA.



Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders.
